title: adding identical (primary key) constraints with different name allowed
poc: alter table mulpk add constraint pk1 primary key (id);
alter table mulpk add constraint pk2 primary key (id);
alter table mulpk add constraint pk3 primary key (id);
key_bug_features: Adding multiple primary key constraints with different names
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE mulpk (id int NOT NULL, name varchar(50));
ALTER TABLE mulpk ADD CONSTRAINT pk1 PRIMARY KEY (id);
ALTER TABLE mulpk ADD CONSTRAINT pk2 PRIMARY KEY (name);
SELECT * FROM mulpk WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
